reviews.comment:
Bien cuidada sus baños limpios.
Pero extremadamente caro si quieres comprar algo para comer o tomar.

(Translated by Google)
The bathrooms are well-maintained and clean.

But it's extremely expensive if you want to buy food or drinks.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURSaS1EUjdnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Estación sencilla pero pudimos comer sencillo,

(Translated by Google)
Simple station but we were able to eat simple food.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURScy11Y05BEAE

reviews.comment:
Malo el servicio solo hay una isla q atiende encima se hacen los vivos y te cobran solo en efectivo cuando cargas y no con tarjeta de crédito.. Entonces tenes q hir con un camión de caudales para pagar y si no te quedas ahí xq no llegas a otra estación con la nafta.. Unos chantas.. Tengan en cuenta eso,no se queden sin efectivo si pasan x ahí

(Translated by Google)
The service is terrible; there's only one pump island, and on top of that, they try to rip you off by only accepting cash when you fill up, not credit cards. So you practically have to go with an armored truck to pay, and if you can't get there, you're stuck because you can't get to another station with enough gas. They're a bunch of crooks. Keep that in mind; don't run out of cash if you're passing through there.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURSdmZUMmtnRRAB

bueno , limpio , amplia , con muchos surtidores..

Good, clean, spacious, with many pumps.

reviews.comment:
Muchísima espera para cargar, y es el único lugar entre dos provincias.
Un desastre el monopolio.
Todos esperando que se aliste

(Translated by Google)
Extremely long waits to load, and it's the only place between two provinces.
The monopoly is a disaster. Everyone's waiting for it to be ready.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURSNm9HRU9BEAE

reviews.comment:
Buen café. Lo que si la atención del surtidor es lenta.. no por el personal si no porque faltan surtidores. La atención de la playa fantástica.

(Translated by Google)
Good coffee. However, the service at the pumps is slow... not because of the staff, but because there aren't enough pumps. The service on the beach was fantastic.
